name: Penguin Block
short_description: The penguins have turned into blocks!? 🐧 Place blocks and clear rows, columns, and 3×3 areas in this simple puzzle game.
detailed_description:
The penguins have turned into blocks!? 🐧

Penguin Block is a simple puzzle game where you place blocks on a grid board and clear them by completing rows, columns, or 3×3 areas.

Place the penguin blocks wisely and see how high you can push your score!

Features

  • Intuitive Controls

Move and place blocks easily using just the left mouse button.

  • Online Leaderboards

Compete for high scores with players from around the world!

Can you reach the top of the rankings?

Controls

Mouse Only!

Streaming / Gameplay Videos

You’re very welcome to create gameplay videos and livestreams! 🐧✨

■ Request

- We would appreciate it if you could include a link to the Steam store page in your video description (optional).

■ Prohibited

- Modifying or redistributing game data

- Using the game for content that is offensive or violates public order and morals

We hope you enjoy playing the game! 🐧✨

Some in-game translations were generated using AI tools.
